ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests performed */,
  "positives" INTEGER /* Number of positive cases */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered patients */,
  "hosp" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions */,
  "vent" INTEGER /* Number of ventilator usage */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region for the given date */,
  "vaccinations" INTEGER /* Number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Vaccination rate as a percentage of the population */,
  "recovery_rate" TEXT /* Recovery rate as a percentage of confirmed cases */,
  "mortality_rate" TEXT /* Mortality rate as a percentage of confirmed cases */,
  "positivity_rate" TEXT /* Positivity rate as a percentage of tests performed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or country */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region or country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude,longitude) of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the region's health department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., health department, research institute) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data entry
ID of the region the data belongs to
Population of the region for the given date
Vaccination rate as a percentage of the population
Recovery rate as a percentage of confirmed cases
Mortality rate as a percentage of confirmed cases
Positivity rate as a percentage of tests performed
Name of the region or country
Location of the region or country
Contact information of the region's health department
Unique identifier for each data source
Type of the data source (e.g., health department, research institute)
Contact information of the data source
